rulings.Case Title: CONSERVATORSHIP OF OKSOON JAE CORTE
rulings.Calendar Matter: PETITION TO TERMINATE CONSERVATORSHIP of Person and Estate
rulings.Rulings: Continued to 6/14/2021. Endorsed-filed single sided courtesy copies are required for any papers filed with the court and must be received by Examiner in room 202 at the Superior Court. Examiners will not review any document until after it has been filed and a courtesy copy has been received. [LRSF 2.7, 14.7]. Courtesy copies dropped off without a hearing date or examiner name on the top page or on the envelope, will be processed by the clerks as time allows and may cause delays. Petitioner must submit a hard copy of the proposed order to the Examiner in room 202 at least five (5) court days in advance of the scheduled hearing date, with the scheduled hearing date noted on the face sheet. [LRSF 14.7]. Proposed orders dropped off without a hearing date or examiner name on the top cover page or on the envelope, will be processed by the clerks as time allows and may cause delays.

rulings.Calendar Matter: ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Accounting #3, Report, Fees
rulings.Rulings: Hearing appearance required. Remote appearance by video or telephone should be made whenever possible. Please review the 9th amended general order for more information. To appear by Zoom, go to Zoom.com and click Join Meeting, and use the ID and password below. Meeting ID: 875 8017 7925 Password: 722809 To appear by telephone through Zoom, call 1-669-900-6833 and follow the prompts, using the meeting ID and password above. Parties appearing should check in for the hearing using their full name. ISSUES (may be addressed at hearing): 1) 1/2/2019 Agreement terms state Chiu Leung Luk, Chiu Ki Luk, Run Bing LulI, and Jennifer Run Ping Lu assume full responsibility for payment of property taxes, insurance at 142-144 Wetmore St. SF, CA. Petitioner alleges repeated requests for reimbursements of costs have been refused and state such funds be paid from the settlor's trust funds. 2) Professional fiduciary Andrea Leung is requesting 1% in fees or $21,594.84 in compensation. Timesheets filed 04/22/2021 allege $10,353.00 in fees rendered. 105.50 hours at $145.00 per hour = $15,297.50.

rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF VICTOR CADIZ
rulings.Calendar Matter: ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Accounting #1, Final Distribution
rulings.Rulings: Continued to 6/14/21. (No earlier availability.) Now an "Amended Second and Final Account," etc., has been filed (on 4/26/21), although the Amended First and Final Account filed on 2/16/21 has not yet been adjudicated in order for there to be a second account. If this newest pleading was intended to be a SECOND AMENDED FIRST AND FINAL ACCOUNT, the caption is erroneously titled and must be amended. No proof of service of notice of this "Amended Second and Final Account," etc., has been filed. Notice must be given after the pleading requiring notice is filed. (A copy of an unfiled and incomplete notice of hearing or proof of service of the "Amended Second Petition for Final Account," etc. was received by this Examiner but was not reviewed as it has not been filed, except to notice that it was notice of a pleading that does not exist and the proof of service was incomplete.) If this latest pleading filed on 4/26/21 was intended to be a SECOND AMENDED FIRST ACCOUNT, an amendment must be filed to correct the caption. The prayer also requests approval of the "Amended First and Final Account," etc., not this "Amended Second and Final Account," etc. Notice of the erroneously titled pleading and the amendment to it must be served after the amendment is filed. The total of the I&As shown in paragraph 17 of this latest pleading is still not the correct total of the I&As filed in this proceeding. Courtesy (endorsed filed) copies of the amendment and a correct and complete proof of service showing that notice of the correct pleadings was given must be received by the assigned Examiner by no later than 6/4/21.

rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF KENNETH LOPEZ
rulings.Calendar Matter: ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Report, Fees, Final Distribution
rulings.Rulings: continued to 6/9/21. as stated in the notes emailed to counsel, the court is looking for a POS of the Notice of Hearing form. DE-120 is a mandatory judicial council form of notice for probate petitions. the POS filed does not show that mandatory form was mailed. in addition, the response says that the petitioner spent more than the $2,603.93 received from the related estate on funeral expenses, but it does not explain why that sum was not included in the report of administration of the estate. Please file a declaration with more information about that issue. filing deadline is noon on 6/1/21.

rulings.Case Title: GUARDIANSHIP OF CODY ZACHARY MA ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Accounting #2, Report, Fees
rulings.Rulings: Continued to 5/26/21. Each accounting filed with the court must include the supporting documents, including all original statements, specified in section 2620(c) of the Probate Code. (1) If a conservator or guardian receives a statement from the issuing institution in electronic form but not in paper form, the court has discretion to accept a computer-generated printout of that statement as an original in satisfaction of the requirements in section 2620(c) if: (A) The fiduciary submitting the printout verifies under penalty of perjury that the statement was received in electronic form and printed without alteration; and (B) The printout is an "original," as defined in Evidence Code section 255.

rulings.Calendar Matter: ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
rulings.Rulings: Continued to 6/14/2021. 1) Petitioner must file a petition pursuuant to Probate Code 12251. If a personal representative files a petition for the termination of further proceedings and for discharge pursuant to Probate Code 12251, the petition must list creditors claims and disclose any action taken on such claims and must address the notice required by Probate Code 9201-9202. Notice must be given to any creditor whose claim has not been satisfied. [LRSF 14.37].

rulings.Case Title: IN THE MATTER OF THE MARION JENKINS AND GANAIL JENKINS LIVING TRUST
rulings.Calendar Matter: Petition For Order Instructing Trustee To Place Property In Trust
rulings.Rulings: Continued to 6/14/21. Item 5 of the proof of service filed on 4/1/21 (no courtesy provided) was not checked to indicate that copies of the petition and supplement were served along with the notice of hearing. The face of the notice did not also reflect that a supplement had been filed. [CRC 7.53(b).] Ellis Jenkins is not a trust beneficiary. (See paragraph 6.4(c) on page 16 of the trust.) Did he predecease the settlors? Since an estate has been opened for Marion Jenkins, why are the two Bank of America accounts in his name not part of his estate? A courtesy copy of any papers filed to address these issues must be received by the assigned Examiner by 6/4/21.

rulings.Case Title: IN THE MATTER OF THE WINIFRED DIAS REVOCABLE TRUST
rulings.Calendar Matter: Petition For Order Appointing Successor Trustee
rulings.Rulings: Continued to 6/21/2021 1) The Court will require a bond of all successor trustees not named in the trust instrument unless all beneficiaries waive bond. The assets on hand must be listed with the fair market value to allow the Court to set the bond. [LRSF 14.16 G.] 2) Please explain and provide legal authority for why notice to Theresa Pinto and Eulalia Pinto was given to c/o Wilfred Pinto. An endorsed-filed single sided hard copy of all documents filed in response to these notes, as well as any other documents required must be received by this Examiner in room 202 no later than 4 pm on 6/7/2021 [LRSF 14.7 B.]

rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF LAN OY LOUIE
rulings.Calendar Matter: PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
rulings.Rulings: Continued to 6/14/2021. 1) Confidential Statement of Birth Date and Driver's License Number (Judicial Council Form DE-147S) is also required, pursuant to Probate Code 8404(b). Form DE-147S must be filed separately and confidentially. Do not file form DE-147S as an attachment to the Duties and Liabilities form. [LRSF 14.18 E.] 2) Please explain why a petition has been filed 19 years after Decedent died. 3) Please explain why the following person listed on Decedent's Will (living or deceased) is not listed on page 4 under #8: Ben Fung Louie (include date of death if deceased). An endorsed-filed single sided hard copy of all documents filed in response to these notes, as well as any other documents required must be received by this Examiner in room 202 no later than 4 pm on 6/1/2021 [LRSF 14.7 B.]

rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF ALBINA DEMARTINI
rulings.Calendar Matter: PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
rulings.Rulings: Continued to 6/9/21. No courtesy copies. [LRSF 2.7 B. and 14.7 B.] No proof of publication. A cursory review of the petition shows that the petitioner is missing from item 8. Her Confidential Statement of Birth Date and Driver's License Number, the only courtesy copy that was received as of 5/6/21, shows her date of birth as "N/A." All courtesy copies must be received by the assigned Examiner by 5/28/21 in order to avoid another automatic continuance.
